name: tempo
description: Grafana Tempo connector — OTLP-native tracing backend. Surfaces trace-derived service latency (per-trace duration) via the TraceQL search API, discovers services from the resource.service.name tag, derives a service-graph (CALLS edges) by sampling recent traces, and (since 1.2.0) implements queryTraces so the gateway's `query_traces` MCP tool returns real ranked trace summaries. Optional Bearer auth.
